strelnice.title: Shooting Range
strelnice.heading: SHOOTING RANGE SKLEP
strelnice.subtitle: Indoor shooting range in Domažlice
strelnice.heroTagline: SHOOTING ROOM SKLEP is a place where adrenaline, fun and the opportunity to learn something new come together in a building with history!
strelnice.introHeading: Indoor shooting range: Fun and adrenaline under one roof
strelnice.introDescription: Are you looking for a way to experience something special, have fun and learn new skills at the same time? The indoor shooting range is the ideal place for everyone - whether you are planning a company party, team building, or just want to try shooting for yourself. And what's the best? You don't need a shooting license!
strelnice.forWhoCorporate: Corporate teams: Combine fun with building team spirit during shooting competitions.
strelnice.forWhoIndividuals: Individuals: Enjoy a moment of adrenaline and practice your aim.
strelnice.forWhoLicense: Those interested in a shooting license: The perfect environment for preparation and training.
strelnice.forWhoFamilies: Families with children from 10 years: Under the supervision of instructors, even the youngest can try shooting, safely and fun of course.
strelnice.expectPackages: Rich packages: Choose from a variety of weapon combinations, from classic to modern equipment.
strelnice.expectInstructors: Experienced instructors: Professionals will be available at all times to ensure not only your safety, but also a great experience.
strelnice.descriptionTitle: Accuracy and power in the unique Shooting Range Sklep
strelnice.description: So what do you say, when will you test your accuracy and determination? The Sklep Shooting Range is a modern indoor shooting range in the center of Domažlice in a historical building with roots dating back to 1341, when the U Svaté studny brewery originally operated here. It combines the unique atmosphere of the past with the latest technologies for the ultimate shooting experience.
features: 3 firing positions with a length of 25 meters
Wireless video transmission to the firing line – instant hit overview
High-quality air technology and sound insulation
Ideal for sports shooting and professional training
strelnice.historyTitle: BREWERY U SVATÉ STUDNY - HISTORY OF THE SHOOTING ROOM BUILDING CELLAR
strelnice.history: The Brewery at the Holy Well in Domažlice, also known as the municipal brewery, played an important role in the history of Domažlice brewing. Its origins date back to the period after the town was granted brewing rights, which probably occurred when it was founded in the second half of the 13th century. The townspeople of Domažlice have been brewing beer since the 14th century thanks to a privilege granted by King John of Luxembourg in 1341. The first organized brewery, probably on the site of the later U Svaté studny brewery, was established as a municipal brewery. In 1895, the town moved beer production from the original U Svaté studny municipal brewery to a new area in the Týnské předměstí.
strelnice.barDescription: Of course, there is a modern facility with a bar, a wide range of soft drinks, coffee and snacks. Parking is possible in the street near Střelnice Sklep, or in the nearby area in the town of Domažlice.

zbrane.title: Weapons
zbrane.heading: WEAPONS OFFER SHOOTING RANGE SKLEP
zbrane.description: The SKLEP SHOOT GALLERY is a place where history meets modern technology. View detailed photos of weapons that make up history as well as the latest models that define the current shooting scene. The offer is varied and includes thematic packages that connect weapons according to their stories, period or type. Whether you are interested in legendary weapons from the past or innovations of today, our gallery will draw you into the fascinating world of shooting. Get ready for a selection that is sure to interest you!

packages.intro1: Imagine holding power and adrenaline in your hands. With our shooting packages, you'll experience the unique feeling of handling traditional and modern weapons. For movie buffs, we offer a package inspired by legendary scenes, while World War II fans can explore weapons that made history. And if you're looking for a real-life experience, "Big Boom" is just the thing for you. But our offerings don't end there! Choose your package and become part of an unforgettable adventure.

faq.title: F A Q
faq.intro: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW! YOUR QUESTIONS, OUR ANSWERS! AND IF YOU CAN'T FIND THE ANSWER TO YOUR QUESTION, DON'T HESITATE TO CONTACT US!
faq.instructorsIntro: The shooting instructor at the shooting range plays a key role in ensuring the safety, education and support of shooters. His work includes:
faq.instructorSafety: Safety: The instructor supervises compliance with safety rules, such as proper handling of weapons and protection of hearing and vision.
faq.instructorTeaching: Teaching: Provides theoretical and practical lessons, from the basics of shooting to advanced techniques.
faq.instructorIndividual: Individual approach: Identifies the mistakes and weaknesses of individual shooters and provides feedback for their improvement.
faq.instructorOrg: Organization: Ensures that the shooting range is properly equipped and prepared for instruction or training.
faq.instructorSklep: The Sklep Shooting Range has qualified instructors always available for you.
faq.ownWeaponsText: If you own a ZP and your own weapon, it is not a problem to bring your weapon with you after agreement with the shooting range. It is necessary to inform the shooting range about this.
faq.conditionsText: Operating rules: Each shooting range has its own operating rules that must be followed. These rules may include specific rules, such as restrictions on the type of weapons or ammunition.
faq.childrenTitle: FROM WHAT AGE CAN CHILDREN SHOOT?
faq.childrenIntro: Shooting by children in the Czech Republic is strictly regulated and subject to clear rules designed to ensure safety and responsible handling of weapons.
faq.childrenMinAge: Minimum age: Children can shoot at a shooting range from the age of 10, but only under the supervision of a qualified instructor.
faq.childrenSupervision: Adult supervision: Children must always be supervised by an adult (shooting instructor) who is responsible for their safety.
faq.childrenWeaponType: Type of weapon: Lighter and less powerful weapons, such as air rifles or small-bore rifles, are usually suitable for children.
faq.childrenSafety: Safety Rules: Before shooting, children must undergo basic safety training.
faq.childrenConsent: Parental Consent: Written consent from parents or legal guardians is often required to participate in shooting.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy
gdpr.heading: Processing of Personal Data
gdpr.intro: The controller of personal data pursuant to Article 4(7) of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data (GDPR) is West Bohemian Armament Company, s.r.o.

sections.title: I. Basic provisions
sections.text: The controller of personal data is West Bohemian Armament Company, s.r.o. Contact details: Pavel Kolář, Čapka Choda 347, Domažlice, +420 602 230 497, p.kolar@zcos.cz. Personal data means all information about an identified or identifiable natural person. The controller has not appointed a data protection officer.

sections.title: II. Sources and categories of personal data processed
sections.text: The controller processes personal data that you have provided or that the controller has obtained based on the fulfilment of your order. The controller processes your identification and contact details and data necessary for the fulfilment of the contract.

sections.title: III. Legal basis and purpose of personal data processing
sections.text: The legal basis for processing personal data is: performance of the contract between you and the controller, the controller's legitimate interest in providing direct marketing, and your consent to processing for direct marketing purposes. The purpose of processing is: processing your order and exercising rights and obligations arising from the contractual relationship, and sending commercial communications and other marketing activities.

sections.title: IV. Data retention period
sections.text: The controller retains personal data for the period necessary to exercise rights and obligations arising from the contractual relationship (for 15 years after termination of the contractual relationship), or until consent for marketing purposes is withdrawn, maximum 15 years. After the retention period expires, the controller will delete the personal data.

sections.title: V. Recipients of personal data
sections.text: Recipients of personal data are persons involved in the delivery of goods/services/payment processing, providers of e-shop operation services, and providers of marketing services. The controller does not intend to transfer personal data to a third country (outside the EU) or to an international organisation.

sections.title: VI. Your rights
sections.text: Under the conditions set out in the GDPR, you have the right of access to your personal data, the right to rectification, the right to erasure, the right to object to processing, the right to data portability, and the right to withdraw consent. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection.

sections.title: VII. Security of personal data
sections.text: The controller declares that it has taken all appropriate technical and organisational measures to secure personal data, including technical measures to secure data storage, and that only authorised persons have access to personal data.

sections.title: VIII. Final provisions
sections.text: By submitting an order from the online order form, you confirm that you are familiar with the privacy policy conditions and accept them in full. The controller is entitled to change these conditions and will publish the new version on its website.

gunLicense.title: Conditions for obtaining a gun license
gunLicense.subtitle: How to get a gun license: A step-by-step guide
gunLicense.intro: A gun license is an essential document for anyone who wants to legally own or use a weapon. The process of obtaining one involves several key steps and meeting established legal requirements.
gunLicense.step1Age: Reaching the minimum age limit (usually 18 years, with exceptions for some groups of gun licenses).
gunLicense.step1Criminal: Clean criminal record and reliability, verified through a clean criminal register.
gunLicense.step1Medical: Medical fitness confirmed by a medical examination.
gunLicense.step2Text: The application for a gun license is submitted to the relevant police authority. The applicant must present an identity card, medical certificate and other necessary documents.
gunLicense.step3Text: Applicants must attend a course that includes both theoretical and practical parts. The goal is to learn how to safely handle a weapon and understand the legal regulations.
gunLicense.step4Theory: A theoretical test focused on legislation and safety.
gunLicense.step4Practice: A practical part where the applicant demonstrates the ability to safely handle a weapon and perform shooting.
gunLicense.step5Text: and presenting all required documents, the authority will assess the application. If the decision is positive, the applicant is issued a gun license.
gunLicense.cta: If you meet all the requirements, we will be happy to prepare you for this exam and help you obtain a gun license under professional guidance.
